---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for Ordo
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or workflow gap this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you would like to see implemented.

## Why This Matters

Explain the value to users, maintainers, or product quality.

## Suggested UX / Behavior

Outline the expected interaction model, interface behavior, or workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches or existing workarounds.

## Additional Context

Share screenshots, references, technical considerations, or related issues.
